name_cn: Dynamic Terminal Load with Active Reactive Power Support Scenario
name_en: Dynamic Terminal Load with Active Reactive Power Support Scenario
description_cn: Simulates transient voltage sag and power-quality degradation caused by high-power dynamic loads at feeder ends, coordinating reactive compensation devices for fast voltage support.
description_en: Simulates transient voltage sag caused by dynamic peak loads, and schedules reactive power support from SVG or SOP.
typical_user_requests: Simulate an impact load at feeder ends
Provide SVG reactive support under impact load
Control voltage sag caused by dynamic load

add_svg_kvar.description: Added reactive-power-control capacity of the static var generator (SVG).

validation_rules.message_cn: The configured dynamic impact-load peak exceeds 2000 kW and is outside the normal safety range. Use a reasonable value.

validation_rules.condition: use_svg == false and use_sop == false and use_ess == false
validation_rules.message_cn: All fast reactive-response devices (SVG, SOP, and energy storage) are disabled in a dynamic-load support scenario, creating severe transient-violation risk.

result_interpretation_focus: Evaluate whether reactive compensation devices provide fast millisecond-scale or step-scale reactive power support during dynamic-load impacts.
Compare feeder-end minimum voltage before and after reactive-support actions.
Calculate additional grid loss caused by dynamic reactive power flow to assess side effects of reactive compensation.
